goals.title: Integrate meshes from /Users/bytedance/Downloads/scale0.75 and /Users...
goals.objective: Integrate meshes from /Users/bytedance/Downloads/scale0.75 and /Users/bytedance/Downloads/scale0.5 into the TriSplat project page. Before using them, crop noisy edges, align coordinate systems, and scale them to appropriate browser-viewer dimensions. For duplicate scene ids across scale0.75 and scale0.5 choose the denser/better-looking version. Add the selected processed meshes to the webpage runtime scene/gallery as appropriate, and unify the web-facing scene IDs so they are sequential and do not skip (for example avoid DL3DV-Outdoor-1, 2, 4). Verify local loading and layout.
goals.evidence: Processed and integrated six additional DL3DV web preview meshes from scale0.75/scale0.5; all new PLY files are below the GitHub file-size guard; runtime/gallery scene ids are sequential; syntax, layout QA, regeneration, and WebGL runtime loading verification passed; commit 53fc58b created.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
